summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by adding a fixed floating action button (FAB) in the bottom-right corner of HubView. The implementation includes the Plus icon from lucide-react, state management for the modal (isPostModalOpen), the handlePostTask handler with auth/profile/actor validation, and wires the FAB to open the existing PostTaskModal. The file summary confirms the FAB is always visible and clickable with validation handled via toast messages. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
